CalcDomain
Math & Science

Semantic calculator library

Data-driven hubs, clusters, breadcrumb-ready URLs, and structured data. This prototype ships 18 calculators across Finance, Engineering, and Health & Fitness.

Predictive, faceted search (hub/cluster/tool)
i18n-ready (/en/, more locales later) Breadcrumb + WebApplication + HowTo + FAQ JSON-LD Silo URLs: /en/{hub}/{cluster}/{tool}

Millimeters to Inches Converter
Math & Science · Length Conversions

Convert millimeters to inches with decimal and fractional output plus significant figures.
Typography Unit Converter (px, pt, em, rem, %)
Math & Science · Typography & CSS Units

Convert typography units with accessibility context and live preview.
Kilograms to Pounds Converter
Math & Science · Mass Conversions

Convert kilograms to pounds and show weight under different gravity fields.
Centimeters to Inches Converter
Math & Science · Length Conversions

Convert centimeters to inches with decimal and fractional output and dual metric/imperial context.
Pounds to Kilograms Converter
Math & Science · Mass Conversions

Convert pounds to kilograms with historical context and mass/weight distinction.
BTU to kWh Converter
Math & Science · Energy Conversions

Convert BTU ↔ kWh with clarity on energy vs power and HVAC examples.
Ångström to Nanometer Converter
Math & Science · Nano Scale Conversions

Convert Å ↔ nm with scientific notation for nanoscience and spectroscopy contexts.
Kelvin to Fahrenheit Converter
Math & Science · Temperature Conversions

Convert Kelvin ↔ Fahrenheit with Celsius intermediate and absolute-zero context.
Degrees to Radians Converter
Math & Science · Angles & Trigonometry

Convert degrees ↔ radians with trig outputs and π relationships.
Cups to Tablespoons Converter
Math & Science · Cooking & Volume

Convert cups ↔ tablespoons with regional standards and mL output.
